concerning: overall coverage gap <= -0.02, severe-undercoverage share >= 0.05, unresolved rate > 0.01, or empty-CR rate > 0.01

diagnostic_confidence.high: CR status, numerical resolution, components, blocks, and warnings stored
diagnostic_confidence.limited: one or more rich CR diagnostic families absent

insufficiently diagnosable: coverage itself or the fields needed to apply performance rules are unavailable
strong: absolute overall coverage gap <= 0.01; overall Wilson interval includes 0.95; zero severe scenarios; unresolved and empty rates <= 0.001; relative RMSE <= 1.15; relative mean CR length <= 1.20; and rich CR diagnostics
